channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Trump Administration Refuses to Share Evidence With Minnesota Officials in Alex Pretti Shooting Investigation
item.description: The Trump administration has denied Minnesota law enforcement officials access to evidence related to the fatal shooting of Minneapolis intensive care nurse Alex Pretti, according to an announcement f...

item.title: Study Finds Gifted Men Show Lower Levels of Conservatism, While Political Views Are Otherwise Similar
item.description: A recent study published in the journal Intelligence examined the long-term political orientations of adults identified as gifted during childhood. Researchers tracked participants from the Marburg Gi...

item.title: Michigan Republican Gubernatorial Candidate Criticized for Remarks Referencing ‘Treason’ and Public Hanging
item.description: A Republican candidate for governor of Michigan, Anthony Hudson, is facing widespread criticism after making public remarks that referenced treason and the punishment of public hanging. Hudson, a Gene...

item.title: Christy Carlson Romano Shares Positive Cancer Screening Results, Awaits PET Scan Amid Family History
item.description: Christy Carlson Romano, the 41-year-old actress known for her roles in Disney Channel's 'Even Stevens' and as the voice of 'Kim Possible,' posted an emotional Instagram video on February 17, 2026, rev...

item.title: Trump Approval Ratings Reach Record Low in Second Term Amid Decline Among Independents
item.description: Recent polling data shows President Donald Trump's approval ratings at historic lows during his second term, with four major polls—AP-NORC, NBC News, Yahoo-YouGov, and Quinnipiac—each reporting record...

item.title: Newegg offers $40 discount on $500 Delta gift cards for one day
item.description: Newegg is offering a limited-time, one-day promotion allowing customers to purchase $500 Delta gift cards for $460 by using the promo code SSF3472. This effectively provides an 8% discount on the gift...

item.title: How Everyday Smart Devices Collect and Share Personal Data
item.description: The article, written by Kei Pritsker and published on the blog of Rafael Poch de Feliu, examines how common household technologies collect and potentially share large amounts of personal data. It open...

item.title: Embracing Slow Travel: How to Make Your Trips More Meaningful
item.description: Traditional travel often emphasizes rushing through destinations, ticking off famous landmarks, and documenting every moment for social media. This approach can leave travelers feeling exhausted and d...

item.title: Why Replacing Compilers with AI Binary Generation Is Technically Flawed
item.description: The article critiques Elon Musk's claim that AI will eliminate programming languages by generating binaries directly, bypassing source code. Drawing a historical parallel with Grace Hopper, who create...

item.title: Russia Warns of Possible Naval Response Over European Actions Against Its Oil Tankers
item.description: Russia has issued a warning to several European countries over what it describes as acts of “piracy” targeting vessels linked to its economic interests, particularly oil tankers operating along mariti...

item.title: Historical Analysis of the Oslo Accords and Their Impact on Palestine
item.description: The article analyzes the longstanding impact of so-called 'peace agreements' on the Palestinian struggle, particularly focusing on the Oslo Accords signed in 1993. It argues that these agreements have...

item.title: DHS Plans $38.3bn Expansion of ICE Detention Network Through Warehouse Conversions
item.description: US Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS) is preparing a sweeping expansion of immigration detention capacity, with plans to spend an estimated $38.3bn acquiring and converting warehouses across...

item.title: The LHS 1903 System Offers New Clues About the Origin of the Mini-Neptune Radius Gap
item.description: The planetary system around the red dwarf star LHS 1903, located 116 light-years away in the constellation Lynx, is providing astronomers with an exceptional opportunity to better understand the so-ca...

item.title: Tech Companies Responded to DHS Administrative Subpoenas Targeting Critics of ICE, Report Says
item.description: According to a report cited by The New York Times and covered by Gizmodo, Reddit, Meta, and Google voluntarily complied with at least some requests from the U.S. Department of Homeland Security (DHS) ...

item.title: Cuba’s Economic Dependency and Political History from Batista to Today
item.description: Cuba's modern history has been shaped by a succession of powerful patrons and structural economic dependencies. During the Batista era, the island was dominated by a triad of power: Batista, the Ameri...

item.title: World of Hyatt Offers 20% Discount on Points Purchases Through April 7, 2026
item.description: World of Hyatt has launched a limited-time promotion offering a 20% discount on purchased points, reducing the cost to 2.08 cents per point. The offer is valid for transactions made between February 1...

item.title: Ukraine’s Former Energy Minister Detained Over Alleged $100M Corruption Scheme
item.description: Ukraine’s National Anti-Corruption Bureau (NABU) has detained former Energy Minister German Galushchenko while he was attempting to leave the country. Galushchenko resigned in November 2025 amid a maj...

item.title: Targeted Capital One Offer Provides 5,000 Bonus Miles for $200+ CardCash Gift Card Purchases
item.description: Capital One has introduced a targeted promotion through its Capital One Offers shopping portal that allows eligible cardholders to earn 5,000 bonus miles when they spend at least $200 on gift cards fr...

item.title: Bank of America to Reduce Preferred Rewards Bonuses and Adjust Eligibility Tiers
item.description: Bank of America has announced upcoming changes to its Preferred Rewards program, rebranding it as 'BofA Rewards' starting in May 2026. The program will see a reduction in status tiers from four to thr...

item.title: Targeted Delta Platinum Amex Promotion Offers Double MQDs on Spending Through May 17, 2026
